summary: Iteration 102 - Sidebar+Flyout Navigation UX Testing. All 13 features tested and passed. The top horizontal nav bar has been replaced with a sidebar navigation approach where 5 nav group buttons (Workspace, Plan, AI Agents, Build, Insights) are positioned between the header and channels section. Clicking a nav group opens a flyout panel to the RIGHT of the sidebar that PUSHES main content (not overlay). All interaction behaviors working: toggle, escape key, click outside closes flyout. Active states show cyan highlights correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Sidebar.js: Nav menu section added at lines 183-217 with proper data-testid attributes (nav-menu-{id})
WorkspacePage.js: NAV_MENUS constant (lines 60-134) correctly defines 5 groups with items
WorkspacePage.js: Flyout panel rendered at lines 459-496 using flex layout (w-52) that pushes content right
WorkspacePage.js: Click outside handler (lines 167-184) uses menuRef to close flyout
WorkspacePage.js: Escape key handler properly closes flyout via document.addEventListener('keydown')
ChevronRight icon rotates 90deg when flyout is open (CSS class rotate-90)
Active tab shows cyan dot indicator (span with bg-cyan-400 class) in flyout
Active nav group shows cyan highlight (text-cyan-400 bg-cyan-400/10 classes)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sidebar+Flyout navigation UX fully implemented and verified. The old horizontal dropdown nav bar from iteration 101 has been replaced with: 1) 5 nav group buttons in sidebar between header and channels, 2) Flyout panel that opens to the RIGHT and PUSHES main content, 3) All data-testid attributes preserved (nav-menu-{id}, flyout-{id}, tab-{key}), 4) Toggle, escape, click outside behaviors all working, 5) Active states show cyan highlights correctly. Layout measurements verified: sidebar=256px, flyout=208px, main content left position matches (464px when open, 256px when closed).

sidebar_nav_buttons.position: Between header and channels section in sidebar

active_nav_group_highlight.classes_applied: text-cyan-400 bg-cyan-400/10 (when flyout open), text-cyan-400/80 bg-cyan-400/5 (when active but flyout closed)

mocked_apis.note: All APIs using real backend endpoints
